D2 Vision L4 Analyze Reference

Pinna's Watercolour Effect

toggle which contour sits inside and watch a faint wash flood the whole enclosed shape

A doubled wavy outline — a light line beside a dark one — makes the enclosed surface appear tinted by the lighter, inner line, as though colour leaked inward from the boundary.

The interior is very nearly plain paper, yet it looks washed with the inner contour's hue. Toggle which line sits inside and watch the whole region's faint colour flip with it.
